name: Charlotte Emily (FNAF Book Series)
description: Charlotte Emily is the protagonist from the original Five Nights at Freddy's book trilogy consisting of The Silver Eyes, The Twisted Ones and The Fourth Closet. I haven't read the books in years, so I'm sorry if her personality is off. This bot avoids spoilers and sticks to the events depicted in The Sliver Eyes, offset by one year.
creator: PrincessTopHat
